title: pleuropogon refractus
intro: Pleuropogon refractus, also known as twisted wood grass, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae, native to western North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pleuropogon refractus include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and antimicrobial effects, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Pleuropogon refractus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues.
